---
title: "9 - Microbe and regorafenib correlations"
output: html_document
date: "2026-06-18"
---

# load packages and files

```{r}
library(data.table)
library(tidyverse)
library(tibble)
library(Hmisc)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(arrow)

metadata <- read.csv("~/Documents/gutmicrobiome_pharmacology/hmp2_metadata_2018-08-20.csv")

#16S and transcriptomic files
mic <- read_csv("~/Documents/gutmicrobiome_pharmacology/taxonomic_profiles_16S.csv")
mic_label <- mic %>%
  dplyr::select(`#OTU ID`, taxonomy) %>%
  rename(OTU_ID = `#OTU ID`)

hxtx <- read_csv("~/Documents/gutmicrobiome_pharmacology/HOST TRANSCRIPTOMICS host_tx_counts FILTERED less zeros.csv")
hxtx1 <- hxtx[,-1]

x <- arrow::read_parquet("~/Documents/gutmicrobiome_pharmacology/lincs_drug_gene_data_mean")
xmeta <- arrow::read_parquet("~/Documents/gutmicrobiome_pharmacology/lincs_drug_meta")

x <- data.frame(x, row.names = 1)
```

# clean metadata

```{r}
temp <- metadata %>% 
  filter(data_type == "host_transcriptomics" | data_type == "biopsy_16S") %>%
  filter(site_name == "Cedars-Sinai" | site_name == "MGH") %>%
  mutate(data_type = as.factor(data_type)) %>%
  mutate(biopsy_location = as.factor(biopsy_location), 
         is_inflamed = as.factor(is_inflamed),
         diagnosis = as.factor(diagnosis),
         sex = as.factor(sex))

metadata_hxtx <- filter(temp, data_type =="host_transcriptomics")
metadata_mic <- filter(temp, data_type =="biopsy_16S") 
```

# clean up host transcriptomics

```{r}
metadata_hxtx_rectum_yes <- metadata_hxtx %>%
  filter(biopsy_location == "Rectum",
         is_inflamed == "Yes",
         IntervalName == "Screening Colonoscopy")

# Match the External.IDs present in metadata_hxtx_rectum_yes
hxtx_location8 <- hxtx1 %>%
  dplyr::select(names(hxtx1)[1], all_of(metadata_hxtx_rectum_yes$External.ID))
```

# clean up taxonomic profiles

```{r}
metadata_mic_rectum_yes <- metadata_mic %>%
  filter(biopsy_location == "Rectum",
         is_inflamed == "Yes",
         IntervalName == "Screening Colonoscopy")

# Match the External.IDs present in metadata_mic_rectum_yes
mic1 <- mic %>%
  dplyr::select(names(mic)[1], all_of(metadata_mic_rectum_yes$External.ID))
```

## replacing External.ID to Participant.ID

```{r}
matching <- metadata_hxtx_rectum_yes %>%
  dplyr::select(External.ID, Participant.ID)
setnames(hxtx_location8, matching$External.ID, matching$Participant.ID)

matching2 <- metadata_mic_rectum_yes %>%
  dplyr::select(External.ID, Participant.ID)
setnames(mic1, matching2$External.ID, matching2$Participant.ID)
```

## set up dataframes for correlations

```{r}
#transpose metab_location1
t_mic1 = as.data.frame(x = t(mic1), stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
t_mic1 <- t(mic1)
colnames(t_mic1) <- t_mic1[1, ]
t_mic1_1 <- t_mic1[-1,]

#transpose hxtx_location1
t_hxtx_location8 <- t(hxtx_location8)
colnames(t_hxtx_location8) <- t_hxtx_location8[1, ]
t_hxtx_location8_1 <- t_hxtx_location8[-1,]

#convert into dataframes
t_hxtx_location8_1 <- as.data.frame(t_hxtx_location8_1)
t_mic1_1 <- as.data.frame(t_mic1_1)

#intersect with common row names
common_row_names <- intersect(rownames(t_hxtx_location8_1), rownames(t_mic1_1))
hxtx_location8_1_common <- t_hxtx_location8_1[common_row_names, ]
mic1_1_common <- t_mic1_1[common_row_names, ]

dfhxtx <- mutate_all(hxtx_location8_1_common, function(x) as.numeric(as.character(x)))
dfmic <- mutate_all(mic1_1_common, function(x) as.numeric(as.character(x)))

dfhxtx <- tibble::rownames_to_column(dfhxtx, "patient_id")
dfmic <- tibble::rownames_to_column(dfmic, "patient_id")
```

## clean up 16S

```{r}
library(compositions)

# 1. Prevalence filter first
prev_threshold <- 0.20
mic_prev <- colMeans(dfmic[,-1] > 0)
keep_otus <- names(mic_prev[mic_prev >= prev_threshold])
dfmic_filt <- dfmic[, c("patient_id", keep_otus)]

# 2. CLR transform (add small pseudocount for zeros)
mic_mat_filt <- as.matrix(dfmic_filt[,-1])
mic_mat_filt <- mic_mat_filt + 0.5  # pseudocount
mic_clr <- as.data.frame(compositions::clr(mic_mat_filt))

dfmic_clr <- cbind(patient_id = dfmic_filt$patient_id, mic_clr)
```

## save files to run in HPC if have to

```{r}
write_csv(dfhxtx, "~/Documents/gutmicrobiome_pharmacology/dfhxtx.csv")
write_csv(dfmic, "~/Documents/gutmicrobiome_pharmacology/dfmic.csv")
write_csv(dfmic_clr, "~/Documents/gutmicrobiome_pharmacology/dfmic_clr.csv")
```

# MICROBE X GENE CORRELATIONS

```{r}
# --- 1. Extract numeric matrices (drop patient_id column) ---
genes_mat <- as.matrix(dfhxtx[, -1])   # 40 x ~10000
mic_mat <- as.matrix(dfmic_clr[, -1])   # 40 x ~650

rownames(genes_mat) <- dfhxtx$patient_id
rownames(mic_mat) <- dfmic_clr$patient_id

# --- 2. Rank-transform columns (= Spearman) ---
genes_ranked <- apply(genes_mat, 2, rank)
mic_ranked <- apply(mic_mat, 2, rank)

# --- 3. Compute ALL correlations at once via matrix multiply ---
# rcorr on combined ranked matrix, then extract the cross-block
combined <- cbind(genes_ranked, mic_ranked)
rc <- Hmisc::rcorr(combined, type = "pearson")  # pearson on ranks = spearman

n_genes <- ncol(genes_ranked)
n_mic <- ncol(mic_ranked)

rho_mat <- rc$r[1:n_genes, (n_genes+1):(n_genes+n_mic)]
p_mat   <- rc$P[1:n_genes, (n_genes+1):(n_genes+n_mic)]
n_mat   <- rc$n[1:n_genes, (n_genes+1):(n_genes+n_mic)]

# --- 4. Pivot to long format ---
rho_long <- as.data.frame(rho_mat) %>%
  mutate(x = rownames(rho_mat)) %>%
  pivot_longer(-x, names_to = "y", values_to = "rho")

p_long <- as.data.frame(p_mat) %>%
  mutate(x = rownames(p_mat)) %>%
  pivot_longer(-x, names_to = "y", values_to = "p")

n_long <- as.data.frame(n_mat) %>%
  mutate(x = rownames(n_mat)) %>%
  pivot_longer(-x, names_to = "y", values_to = "n")

gmicr_corr <- rho_long %>%
  left_join(p_long, by = c("x", "y")) %>%
  left_join(n_long, by = c("x", "y")) %>%
  mutate(message = ifelse(is.na(rho), "insufficient data", "ok")) %>%
  # --- 5. FDR corrections (matching coracle's q_x, q_y, q) ---
  group_by(x) %>%
  mutate(q_x = p.adjust(p, method = "BH")) %>%   # FDR per gene (across all its metabolites)
  ungroup() %>%
  group_by(y) %>%
  mutate(q_y = p.adjust(p, method = "BH")) %>%   # FDR per metabolite (across all its genes)
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(q = p.adjust(p, method = "BH")) %>%      # global FDR across all 6.5M pairs
  dplyr::select(x, y, rho, p, n, message, q_x, q_y, q)
```

# MICROBE x REGORAFENIB CORRELATION

## prep

```{r}
gmicr_corr_u <- gmicr_corr |>
  dplyr::select(x, y, rho)

gmicr_corr_u1 <- gmicr_corr_u %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = y, values_from = rho)

gmicr_corr_u2 <- column_to_rownames(gmicr_corr_u1, var = "x")

rego_id <- xmeta %>%
  filter(pert_name == "regorafenib")

x_rego <- x[, colnames(x) %in% rego_id, drop = FALSE]

#intersect with common row names which are GENES
common_genes <- intersect(rownames(x_rego), rownames(gmicr_corr_u2))
mic_rectum_common <- gmicr_corr_u2[common_genes, ]
rego_common <- x_rego[common_genes, ]

rego_common <- data.frame(regorafenib = x_rego[common_genes, ])
rownames(rego_common) <- common_genes

#convert row names back to column
#df_micr <- tibble::rownames_to_column(mic_rectum_common, "gene")
#df_rego <- tibble::rownames_to_column(rego_common, "gene")
```

## correlate

```{r}
#Rank transform (Spearman)
mic_ranked  <- apply(mic_rectum_common, 2, rank)
rego_ranked <- apply(rego_common, 2, rank)

#Single rcorr call
combined <- cbind(rego_ranked, mic_ranked)
rc <- Hmisc::rcorr(combined, type = "pearson")

n_rego <- ncol(rego_ranked)  # = 1
n_mic  <- ncol(mic_ranked)

rho_mat <- rc$r[1:n_rego, (n_rego+1):(n_rego+n_mic), drop = FALSE]
p_mat   <- rc$P[1:n_rego, (n_rego+1):(n_rego+n_mic), drop = FALSE]
n_mat   <- rc$n[1:n_rego, (n_rego+1):(n_rego+n_mic), drop = FALSE]

#Pivot to long format
rho_long <- as.data.frame(rho_mat) %>%
  mutate(x = rownames(rho_mat)) %>%
  pivot_longer(-x, names_to = "y", values_to = "rho")

p_long <- as.data.frame(p_mat) %>%
  mutate(x = rownames(p_mat)) %>%
  pivot_longer(-x, names_to = "y", values_to = "p")

n_long <- as.data.frame(n_mat) %>%
  mutate(x = rownames(n_mat)) %>%
  pivot_longer(-x, names_to = "y", values_to = "n")

#Combine and FDR correct
rego_mic_corr <- rho_long %>%
  left_join(p_long, by = c("x", "y")) %>%
  left_join(n_long, by = c("x", "y")) %>%
  mutate(message = ifelse(is.na(rho), "insufficient data", "ok")) %>%
  mutate(q = p.adjust(p, method = "BH")) %>%   # global FDR (only 122 pairs, very simple)
  arrange(desc(abs(rho))) %>%
  dplyr::select(x, y, rho, p, n, message, q)
```

# save files

```{r}
write_csv(gmicr_corr, "~/Documents/gutmicrobiome_pharmacology/microbe and gene correlations 6-18-2026.csv")
write_csv(rego_mic_corr, "~/Documents/gutmicrobiome_pharmacology/microbe and regorafenib correlation 6-18-2026.csv")
```

# top microbes

```{r}
# Parse taxonomy string into levels
mic_label_parsed <- mic_label %>%
  mutate(
    taxonomy = str_replace_all(taxonomy, "__", ""),  # remove the __ prefix
    phylum  = str_extract(taxonomy, "(?<=; )[^;]+(?=; [^;]+; [^;]+; [^;]+; [^;]+$)"),
    genus   = str_extract(taxonomy, "[^;]+$") %>% str_trim()  # last element = genus
  )

# Join back to your correlation results
rego_mic_corr_labeled <- rego_mic_corr %>%
  left_join(mic_label_parsed, by = c("y" = "OTU_ID")) %>%
  arrange(desc(abs(rho)))

mimics   <- rego_mic_corr_labeled %>% filter(rho > 0) %>% head(10)
opposers <- rego_mic_corr_labeled %>% filter(rho < 0) %>% head(10)

# See what genera you're working with
mimics %>% dplyr::select(y, rho, q, genus)
opposers %>% dplyr::select(y, rho, q, genus)
```

# query UniProt

```{r}
library(httr)
library(jsonlite)

# Function to query UniProt for beta-glucuronidase (EC 3.2.1.31) per genus
check_hits <- function(genus) {
  url <- paste0(
    "https://rest.uniprot.org/uniprotkb/search?query=",
    "ec:3.2.1.31+AND+taxonomy_name:", genus,
    "&format=json&size=10&fields=accession,protein_name,organism_name,ec"
  )
  resp <- GET(url)
  content <- fromJSON(rawToChar(resp$content), simplifyVector = FALSE)
  
  if (length(content$results) == 0) {
    cat(genus, "- no hits\n")
    return(data.frame(genus = genus, accession = NA, 
                      organism = NA, protein = NA))
  }
  
  cat(genus, "- hits:", length(content$results), "\n")
  
  map_dfr(content$results, function(r) {
    data.frame(
      genus     = genus,
      accession = r$primaryAccession %||% "unknown",
      organism  = r$organism$scientificName %||% "unknown",
      protein   = r$proteinDescription$recommendedName$fullName$value %||% "unknown"
    )
  })
}

# Run for all genera
glucuronidase_detailed <- map_dfr(genera, function(g) {
  Sys.sleep(0.5)
  check_hits(g)
})

glucuronidase_detailed

# Summarize
glucuronidase_summary <- glucuronidase_detailed %>%
  group_by(genus) %>%
  summarise(
    hits = sum(!is.na(accession)),
    has_glucuronidase = any(!is.na(accession)),
    organisms = paste(unique(organism[!is.na(organism)]), collapse = "; ")
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(hits))

glucuronidase_summary

# Clean up with manual corrections
glucuronidase_final <- glucuronidase_summary %>%
  mutate(
    has_glucuronidase = case_when(
      genus == "Haemophilus" ~ FALSE,  # hit was Histophilus somni, different genus
      genus == "Veillonella" ~ FALSE,  # hit was V. criceti, protein unconfirmed
      genus == "Parabacteroides" ~ TRUE, # known from literature despite no UniProt hit
      TRUE ~ has_glucuronidase
    ),
    evidence = case_when(
      genus == "Haemophilus" ~ "false positive - Histophilus somni",
      genus == "Veillonella" ~ "unconfirmed - V. criceti only",
      genus == "Parabacteroides" ~ "literature only - no UniProt annotation",
      has_glucuronidase ~ "UniProt EC 3.2.1.31",
      TRUE ~ "no evidence found"
    )
  ) %>%
  # join back to correlation results
  left_join(
    rego_mic_corr_labeled %>% 
      dplyr::select(y, genus, rho, q) %>%
      group_by(genus) %>%
      slice_max(abs(rho), n = 1),  # keep top OTU per genus
    by = "genus"
  ) %>%
  mutate(direction = ifelse(rho > 0, "mimic", "opposer")) %>%
  dplyr::select(genus, direction, rho, q, has_glucuronidase, evidence, hits) %>%
  arrange(direction, desc(abs(rho)))

glucuronidase_final

# Fix q display before saving
glucuronidase_final <- glucuronidase_final %>%
  mutate(
    p_display = "< 2.2e-16",
    q_display = "< 2.2e-16"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(genus, direction, rho, p_display, q_display, has_glucuronidase, evidence, hits)

glucuronidase_final
```

## save files

```{r}
write_csv(glucuronidase_final, "~/Documents/gutmicrobiome_pharmacology/glucuronidase_final_6-18-2026.csv")
write_csv(rego_mic_corr_labeled, "~/Documents/gutmicrobiome_pharmacology/rego_mic_corr_labelled_6-18-2026.csv")
```

# Figure

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(ggrepel)

# Prep data - join taxonomy to full correlation results
plot_data <- rego_mic_corr_labeled %>%
  arrange(rho) %>%
  mutate(
    rank = row_number(),
    highlight = genus %in% glucuronidase_final$genus,
    has_glucuronidase = genus %in% 
      filter(glucuronidase_final, has_glucuronidase == TRUE)$genus,
    direction = ifelse(rho > 0, "mimic", "opposer"),
    label = ifelse(highlight, genus, NA)
  )

top_label <- plot_data %>%
  filter(has_glucuronidase == TRUE) %>%
  group_by(direction, genus) %>%
  slice_max(abs(rho), n = 1) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(abs(rho) >= 0.15)  # drops Roseburia opposer and Bacteroides opposer

top_label %>% dplyr::select(genus, direction, rho)

p <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = rank, y = rho)) +
  geom_segment(aes(xend = rank, yend = 0), 
               color = "grey80", linewidth = 0.4) +
  geom_point(data = filter(plot_data, !highlight),
             aes(color = direction), size = 1.5, alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_segment(data = filter(plot_data, highlight),
               aes(xend = rank, yend = 0, color = direction),
               linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_point(data = filter(plot_data, highlight & !has_glucuronidase),
             aes(color = direction), shape = 16, size = 3) +
  geom_point(data = filter(plot_data, highlight & has_glucuronidase),
             aes(fill = direction), 
             shape = 23, size = 4.5, 
             color = "black",
             stroke = 1.0) +
geom_label_repel(data = filter(top_label, direction == "mimic"),
                 aes(label = genus, color = direction),
                 fontface = "italic", size = 2.5,
                 nudge_x = -10,
                 min.segment.length = 0,
                 segment.color = "black",
                 segment.size = 0.5,
                 show.legend = FALSE) +
geom_label_repel(data = filter(top_label, direction == "opposer"),
                 aes(label = genus, color = direction),
                 fontface = "italic", size = 2.5,
                 nudge_x = 10,
                 min.segment.length = 0,
                 segment.color = "black",
                 segment.size = 0.5,
                 show.legend = FALSE) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linewidth = 0.4, linetype = "dashed") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("mimic" = "#E07B54", "opposer" = "#5B8DB8"),
                     name = "Direction") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("mimic" = "#E07B54", "opposer" = "#5B8DB8"),
                    guide = "none") +
  labs(
    x = "OTU rank",
    y = "Spearman rho\n(microbe vs. regorafenib signature)",
    caption = "Diamond = beta-glucuronidase activity confirmed (UniProt EC 3.2.1.31)"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    plot.caption = element_text(size = 8, hjust = 0, face = "italic"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 10)
  )

p
ggsave("~/Documents/gutmicrobiome_pharmacology/figure_rego_mic_corr_6-18-2026.pdf",
       width = 7, height = 4, dpi = 300)

ggsave("~/Documents/gutmicrobiome_pharmacology/figure_rego_mic_corr_6-18-2026.svg",
       width = 7, height = 4, dpi = 300)

#title = "Gut microbiota correlation with regorafenib transcriptomic signature"
```
